rulings.Case Title: CHAU KALLENBACH VS. TERRENCE BLANK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or Contempt; Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or Contempt; Memo Of P&A; Declaration Of Ryan D. Murphy
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Oct 28, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT TERRENCE BLANK's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or Contempt Hearing Required. Plaintiff's counsel to be present in Court. The Court is inclined to grant the motion for terminating sanctions. Hearing will address why OSC Re: Contempt should not be issued against counsel for failure to participate in the discovery process in any manner, e.g. responses, meet and confer, etc. = (501/CFH)
Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Oct 28, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF 20MISSION SF, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/CFH)
